seo.title: Contact BSW TECH | Automotive, IoT & Embedded Engineering
seo.description: Contact BSW TECH to discuss embedded C/C++, AUTOSAR, and IoT projects. Headquarters in Chișinău, Moldova with EU presence (Romania, Estonia). Book a call or send us a message.
seo.keywords: contact BSW TECH, embedded engineering contact, AUTOSAR partner, IoT development contact

hero.title: Let's Build Something Together
hero.subtitle: We're ready to discuss your next Automotive, IoT or Embedded project.

info.title: Get in Touch
info.preferCallDescription: Schedule a 30-minute meeting directly with our engineering team.
